summary: Re-tested the 1-line heuristic fix in detectProfile() (added '&& activeCount <= 4' to the low-delay home-studio bonus). All 4 scenarios from the request PASS exactly as specified. The iteration-19 confidence regression at 8 routed outputs is resolved without breaking the default-state HIGH-confidence path or the empty-routing fallback.

scenario_2_eight_outputs_MEDIUM_car_audi.matrix_verification: in_phy_0 routed to out_phy_0..out_phy_7 (8 active outputs total) confirmed via dsp_state_v1 inspection

expected.reasons_0: No outputs are routed yet — defaulting to Car Audio.

reasons: No outputs are routed yet — defaulting to Car Audio.

scenario_4_smoke_render.expected: cal-profile-bar with 4 buttons + open-one-click + open-auto-capture + open-snapshot + meters-popout all render

critical_code_review_comments: Fix is minimal and well-scoped: line 153 in calibrationProfiles.js gates the home-studio low-delay bonus on `activeCount <= 4`. Comment block (lines 154-156) clearly documents intent. No regression risk to other branches.

Suggestion (non-blocking, carry-over from iteration 19): MetersView.jsx detection banner IIFE (lines 224-290) would benefit from extraction into a dedicated <CalDetectBanner/> component for readability — file is still under the 700-line threshold so not urgent.
seed_data_creation: None. Each scenario clears localStorage and reloads; scenario 2 toggles 6 matrix cells via route-in_phy_0-out_phy_2..7 testids; scenario 3 toggles off the 2 default routes.
context_for_next_testing_agent: The detectProfile heuristic change is verified end-to-end. The scoring at 8 routed outputs + zero delays is now car-audio=4 (band +2, moderate-delay +2), live-band=1, home-studio=0, house-of-worship=0 → margin 3 → MEDIUM. Default 2-output state still hits home-studio=5 vs runner-up 0 → HIGH. Empty routing short-circuits to the early-return LOW path. Matrix cell testids confirmed at pattern 'route-{inputId}-{outputId}' in MatrixRouter.jsx:99. dsp_state_v1 localStorage key holds the persisted zustand state if state mutation via JS is ever needed as a fallback.
rca_of_the_issue: Iteration-19 root cause (home-studio +2 low-delay bonus tying car-audio at 8 routed outputs) is fixed by the conjunct '&& activeCount <= 4' at calibrationProfiles.js:153. The bonus now fires only for small/near-field setups, allowing the active-count band and moderate-delay branch to both award car-audio cleanly at >4 outputs.
